news.summary: A recently launched company was introduced during the ISCT conference in New Orleans, formed by merging two well-established and cutting-edge CDMOs along with a robust testing entity. This development was announced in Philadelphia on May 7, 2025, by Altaris, an investment company based in New York. The new company resulted from targeted acquisitions involving Minaris Regenerative Medicine and others, showcasing a strategic synergy in the industry. This collaboration signifies a monumental step in combining expertise and resources from various sectors.
news.headline: Minaris Advanced Therapies emerges as global cell therapy leader at ISCT conference post acquisition by Altaris.

news.summary: High school students from 28 states will compete in a financial literacy challenge covering stocks, bonds, credit management, and budgeting in New York on May 7, 2025. A total of 34 teams will participate in the event organized by the Council for Economic Education, a national nonprofit organization. The competition aims to test the financial skills of the nation's top teens and promote financial literacy among high school students.
news.headline: 34 teams from 28 states compete in National Personal Finance Challenge, showcasing financial savvy of top high school students.

news.summary: In Bethesda, Maryland on May 7, 2025, EPS Learning, a prominent company offering PreK-12 literacy solutions, has revealed that EPS Reading Accelerator has been recognized as a finalist in two sections of the 2025 EdTech Awards. The categories in which it received acknowledgment are Literacy/Reading Solution and Curriculum and Instruction.
news.headline: EPS Learning's Reading Accelerator named finalist in 2025 EdTech Awards for Literacy/Reading and Curriculum & Instruction.

news.summary: Invitation to a documentary screening of "Left Behind" in Lake Forest, IL on May 20th from 6:30–8:00 p.m. CT at the Gorton Center. Event includes a panel discussion with experts and is presented by Everyone Reading Illinois (ERI) and Suite Escape. The documentary, directed by Emmy Award-winning Producer Anna Toomey, focuses on a powerful storytelling and advocacy platform. To register for the event, visit the provided link.
news.headline: Advocacy for children with dyslexia: Film screening of "Left Behind" and expert panel on May 20, 2025, in Lake Forest, IL. Time: 6:30-8:00 p.m. CT at Gorton Center. Panel discussion post-film with experts. Presented by ERI and Suite Escape. Directed by Anna Toomey.

news.summary: Encore Enterprises, Inc. revealed the purchase of two grocery-anchored retail centers – Northpoint Center in Arlington Heights, Ill., and Cowesett Corners in Warwick, R.I., on April 24, 2025. This acquisition was made in collaboration with AmCap Management Holdings LLC. The sector's performance has shown strength compared to previous years.
news.headline: Encore Enterprises buys 2 grocery-anchored retail centers in Chicago and Rhode Island, increasing its portfolio to 26 properties and 1.41M sq ft.

news.summary: Infosys (NSE: INFY) (BSE: INFY) (NYSE: INFY) and ITHF have decided to continue their digital innovation partnership for an additional three years after the introduction of Famer's Duel, an AI-driven game that honors tennis legends and engages fans. The announcement was made in Newport, R.I., on May 7, 2025.
news.headline: Infosys renews collaboration with ITHF until 2028, launching AI-powered game Famer's Duel. Expanding digital innovation impact.

news.summary: Allstar Coaches is avoiding the chaos and high costs at airports by unveiling the ultimate travel hack for 2025 in Fort Lauderdale, Florida. As of May 7, 2025, as airfares and hotel rates continue to climb, and financial strain burdens families, the company is emphasizing a more efficient approach to vacationing.
news.headline: Allstar Coaches offers alternative travel with RV rentals amidst rising airfare and hotel prices in 2025.

news.summary: In Houston, Chet Morrison Contractors has named Eddie Trahan as the Director of Morrison Offshore, overseeing the pipeline and diving divisions. This appointment aims to enhance the company's operations in the American energy sector. Eddie Trahan will play a pivotal role in leading these divisions, bringing his expertise to drive growth and innovation. This strategic move underscores the company's commitment to strengthening its offshore services.
news.headline: Eddie Trahan named Director of Morrison Offshore by Chet Morrison Contractors to oversee pipeline and diving divisions.

news.summary: Industrial Thermal Services (ITS), a prominent provider of industrial heat treatment and specialty services, has recently completed the acquisition of On-Site Stress Relieving Services (OSR), a specialist in post-weld heat treating (PWHT) and stress relieving based in Nederland, Texas. Through the guidance of Carriage Hill, ITS successfully concluded this transaction, enhancing its national presence with OSR's facilities in Tulsa, OK and Houston, TX. This strategic move, supported by Amberjack Capital Partners, is poised to bolster ITS's operations significantly, consolidating its position in the industry.
news.headline: Industrial Thermal Services acquires On-Site Stress Relieving Services to expand national reach, adding locations in Tulsa, OK; Houston, TX.

news.summary: The potential opening of a Disneyland theme park in Abu Dhabi is expected to significantly boost the company's growth in the region. However, it may also subject Disney and its renowned brand to potential criticisms.
news.headline: Abu Dhabi to host Disney's Magic Kingdom park, predicts boost in regional growth, despite potential criticism.

news.summary: Supported by Prudential, a new platform has been introduced in New York on May 7, 2025, by HighPeak. This platform offers real-time, data-driven forecasts that adjust to changing financial and healthcare environments. It is a cutting-edge AI solution and has gained backing from Prudential. The precision planning platform aims to provide insights and predictions tailored to the evolving landscapes of finance and healthcare.
news.headline: HighPeak, AI platform supported by Prudential, offers real-time healthcare cost insights for advisors. New York, May 7, 2025.

news.summary: Teton, a well-known outdoor brand recognized for affordable and reliable products that offer comfort and convenience, has recently launched two new items in its Nanda Adventure Travel line in Salt Lake City on May 7, 2025. The Nanda Duffel, with a capacity of 55 liters, and the Nanda Backpack, with a capacity of 30 liters, are now available for purchase.
news.headline: Teton introduces new Nanda Adventure Travel line with 55L duffel and 30L backpack, easy setup, wallet-friendly.

news.summary: In recent years, the small nation in the Himalayas has implemented favorable pro-cryptocurrency regulations, accumulating a significant amount of Bitcoin for its national reserve.
news.headline: Bhutan allies with Binance Pay to boost tourism sector; holds Bitcoin in national reserve as part of pro-crypto policy.

news.summary: In the shifting landscape of technology, organizations are increasingly prioritizing speed and reliability over cost when transitioning from cloud to edge computing. According to a recent report released in Princeton, N.J. on May 7, 2025, edge artificial intelligence (AI) is emerging as the crucial component for ensuring the smooth operation of mission-critical tasks. This trend highlights the importance of quick and dependable decision-making in contemporary settings, where every moment counts.
news.headline: Edge AI gaining prominence over Cloud for critical operations due to speed and reliability. Study conducted in Princeton, N.J. - May 7, 2025.

news.summary: In Atlanta on May 7, 2025, Primrose Schools® is marking an important achievement in partnership with AdventHealth for Children, Lift Orlando, Purpose Built Communities®, West Lakes Partnership, and the Bainum Family Foundation. This collaboration has reached a milestone of five years of success, showcasing the impact and positive outcomes of their work together.
news.headline: Primrose Schools commemorates five-year success with key partners in early education sector transformation.

news.summary: A significant milestone has been achieved in the acknowledgment of Korean language education in the United States with the recent designation granted to the Korean American Center. The nonprofit organization, renowned for its commitment to Korean language and cultural education, has received full accreditation by the Western accrediting body. This development signifies a crucial step forward in the national recognition of Korean language education within the U.S. The accreditation was officially announced in Irvine, California, on May 7, 2025, marking a significant achievement for the Korean American Center and the broader Korean community.
news.headline: Korean American Center in Irvine, CA is the first WASC-Accredited Korean Language Center in the U.S, marking a milestone for Korean language education.

news.summary: In Austin, Texas, on May 7, 2025, Flex (NASDAQ: FLEX) released its financial results for the fourth quarter and fiscal year ending on March 31, 2025. Key highlights for the fourth quarter of fiscal year 2025 include net sales amounting to $6.4 billion. The GAAP operating income stood at $305 million, while the adjusted operating income was reported at $396 million.
news.headline: Flex reports $6.4 billion in net sales for fourth quarter fiscal year 2025, with GAAP operating income of $305 million and adjusted income of $396 million.

news.summary: Trinity Capital Inc., a prominent alternative asset firm, reported a significant increase in Total Investment Income by 29.5% compared to the previous year. The Net Asset Value has reached a new record high of $833 million. Furthermore, the Return on Average Equity stands at 15.5%. This achievement was announced in Phoenix on May 7, 2025. Trinity Capital Inc. is listed on Nasdaq under the symbol TRIN.
news.headline: Trinity Capital Inc.'s Q1 2025: Investment Income +29.5%, Net Asset Value $833M, ROE 15.5%. Nasdaq: TRIN.

news.summary: A report released today by ValidiFI, Inc., based in Alpharetta, Georgia, emphasized the significance of thorough consumer banking profiles in fighting against financial fraud. The report, titled Q1 2025 Bank Intelligence Quarterly Report, outlines the crucial role of predictive bank account and payment intelligence. ValidiFI is recognized as a key player in this area.
news.headline: ValidiFI released Q1 2025 Bank Intelligence Quarterly Report emphasizing the importance of consumer profiles.

news.summary: The Bride Kit is a top-selling product from The Rescue Kit Company and will soon be offered on DavidsBridal.com. This kit aims to help brides tackle fashion emergencies on their wedding day. This development was announced on May 7, 2025, in Phoenix. The Rescue Kit Company is a leading brand known for addressing such issues. The availability of The Bride Kit on DavidsBridal.com will provide ease to brides dealing with wedding day mishaps.
news.headline: The Bride Kit from The Rescue Kit Company now available at David's Bridal, solving wedding fashion emergencies.

news.summary: Experts from Aspen Neuroscience, headed by Chief Scientific Officer Dr. Xiaokui Zhang, will conduct presentations in San Diego and New Orleans on May 7, 2025. The focus will be on the automated manufacturing process of Aspen's autologous iPSC-derived neuron replacement therapy for Parkinson's disease. This therapy aims to revolutionize treatment for Parkinson's by utilizing the patient's own cells. The significance of this presentation lies in the potential advancement in Parkinson's disease treatment that could benefit the estimated 10 million people worldwide living with the condition.
news.headline: Aspen Neuroscience to present at ISCT Annual Meeting on automated manufacturing of Parkinson's iPSC-derived therapy.

news.summary: In Atlanta, Manhattan Associates Inc. disclosed that Staples, a top workplace solutions provider, has successfully integrated Manhattan Active® Warehouse Management (WM) into nine U.S. B2B fulfillment sites within 18 months. The remaining fulfillment centers are slated to transition to Manhattan Active WM by the conclusion of 2026. Staples opted for Manhattan Active WM to enhance warehouse operations, diminish picking and order discrepancies, and enhance overall efficiency. The company's choice of this system signifies a substantial investment towards refining its logistical processes for continued growth and robust service delivery.
news.headline: Staples adopts Manhattan Active® Warehouse Management at 9 locations in 18 months to enhance operations; plans to expand by 2026.
Funko partners with WNBA to release first-ever WNBA player Pop! figures, featuring four top stars. Pre-sale starts May 14.

news.summary: B&G Foods, Inc. has released its financial results for the first quarter of 2025. Net Sales amounted to $425.4 million, showing a 10.5% decrease compared to Q1 2024. Base Business Net Sales were also at $425.4 million, down by 10.5%. Diluted EPS was $0.01, with an NM% change, while Adj. Diluted EPS stood at $0.04, showing a 77.8% decrease. Net Income was reported at $0.8 million with an NM% change, and Adj. Net Income was $3.4 million, down by 76.0%. Additionally, Adj. EBITDA was $59.1 million, reflecting a 21.2% decrease. The company also provided guidance for F.
news.headline: B&G Foods' Q1 2025 financial results: Net Sales $425.4M (10.5% decrease from Q1 2024), Diluted EPS $0.01, Adj. EBITDA $59.1M (21.2% decrease).

news.summary: In Florham Park, New Jersey, on May 7, 2025, Cellectar Biosciences, Inc. (NASDAQ: CLRB) disclosed plans to disclose financial results for Q1 2025 ended March 31. The company, a clinical biopharmaceutical entity specializing in cancer treatment drug development, will release this data and offer a corporate update on May 13, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. EST.
news.headline: Cellectar Biosciences to share Q1 financials on May 13, 2025, at 8:30 a.m. Eastern Time. Company NASDAQ: CLRB.

news.summary: Today in San Diego, VivoSim Labs, Inc. (Nasdaq: VIVS) revealed the success of its NAMkind™ platform for liver toxicology prediction at the Digestive Disease Week Conference in San Diego, CA, held from May 2-6, 2025. The platform, offered as a commercial service to pharmaceutical firms, was highlighted in an oral presentation showcasing its exceptional predictive capabilities when assessing a group of test liver compounds. The presentation demonstrated the platform's world-leading performance in this field.
news.headline: VivoSim's Liver Toxicology Prediction Results showcased at Digestive Disease Week, with NAMkind™ platform exhibiting best-in-class power.

news.summary: GreenFirst Forest Products Inc. (TSX: GFP) based in Toronto, will hold a conference call to discuss its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on May 14, 2025, at 9:00 am (Eastern Time). The company's quarterly results will be published after the close of trading on May 13, 2025. To access the live webcast of the earnings call, individuals can dial either (+1) 416 764 8658 or (+1) 888 886 7786, or visit http://momentum.adobeconnect.com/greenfirst2025/.
news.headline: GreenFirst Forest Products Inc. (TSX: GFP) to host Q1 2025 earnings call on May 14, 2025, at 9:00am. Results to be released on May 13, 2025; Webcast available.

news.summary: In MEDELLÍN, Colombia, Mineros S.A. has shared that its subsidiary HEMCO Mineros Nicaragua S.A. has secured the Forest Harvesting Permit necessary to begin construction for the underground mine at the Porvenir Project in Vesubio, Bonanza, Nicaragua. The project is located within the North Caribbean Coast Autonomous Region (RACCN). Mineros S.A. trades on the TSX under the symbols MSA and MINEROS: CB. This news marks a significant step forward for the company's operations in the region, highlighting their commitment to growth and development in the mining sector.
news.headline: Mineros S.A. gets permit for underground mine at Porvenir Project in Nicaragua. Subsidiary HEMCO has Forest Harvesting Permit for construction.

news.summary: An announcement was made by Creative Media & Community Trust (NASDAQ: CMCT; TASE: CMCT) stating that they will disclose their first quarter results for 2025 on Friday, May 9, 2025, before the stock market opens. A conference call is set for 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time that day to review CMCT’s financial performance and operations. Chief Executive Officer David Thompson, Chief Financial Officer Barry Berlin, and Portfolio Oversight will be hosting the call.
news.headline: Creative Media & Community Trust (NASDAQ: CMCT; TASE: CMCT) to report Q1 2025 earnings on May 9, 2025, with a conference call at 12:00 p.m. Eastern Time hosted by CEO, CFO, and Portfolio Oversight.

news.summary: In Phoenix, SmartRent recently disclosed its first quarter 2025 performance. The company achieved annual recurring revenue of $55.9 million during this period, marking a notable 17% growth compared to the previous year.
news.headline: SmartRent's Q1 2025 results show annual recurring revenue at $55.9 million, up 17% from last year.

news.summary: In Seattle (NASDAQ: RDFN), families with one child are facing daycare costs almost equivalent to their rent expenses, while those with two or more children are often spending considerably more on childcare compared to their rent. A recent report by Redfin revealed that in Denver, the average monthly daycare expense for one child totals $1,434, representing 83% of the standard rent payment ($1,720) in the area. The situation is similar in Seattle.
news.headline: Daycare costs outpace rent in major U.S. cities; In Denver, 1 child costs $1,434/mo, 83% of rent ($1,720).

news.summary: In a joint statement today, Bain Capital's Real Estate team and Botanic Properties revealed the acquisition of 45 Crosby Drive in Bedford, Massachusetts. The property, aimed at catering to the specialized requirements of the biomanufacturing sector, was acquired by GenesisM, a real estate platform dedicated to constructing biomanufacturing facilities. The financial details of the purchase were not disclosed.
news.headline: Bain Capital and Botanic Properties buy 45 Crosby Drive in Massachusetts for biomanufacturing conversion; financial terms undisclosed.

news.summary: In Tampa, Florida, KB Home, a leading U.S. homebuilder (NYSE: KBH), revealed the launch of The Preserve at Legends Pointe in Hudson. The community offers new homes tailored to modern living preferences, including contemporary kitchens opening to spacious great rooms, generous bedroom suites with walk-in closets, and lofts. The diverse floor plans, ranging from one to two stories, can accommodate up to six bedrooms and three-and-a-half bathrooms.
news.headline: KB Home opens new community, The Preserve at Legends Pointe in Hudson, Florida. Offers one- and two-story floor plans with up to six bedrooms and modern features. NYSE: KBH.

news.summary: In Washington, Easterly Government Properties, Inc. (NYSE: DEA) disclosed plans for management attendance at Wells Fargo’s 28th Annual Real Estate Securities Conference in Charleston, South Carolina on May 7, 2025. Easterly, a REIT concentrating on Class A commercial properties leased to the U.S. Government, aims for engagement at investor meetings during the event. Easterly Government Properties, Inc. specializes in the acquisition, development, and management of prime properties.
news.headline: Easterly Govt Properties (NYSE: DEA) to join Wells Fargo 28th Real Estate Securities Conference in SC on May 7, 2025.

news.summary: In Calabasas, California, Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI), a prominent national real estate services firm focusing on commercial real estate investment sales, financing, research, and advisory services, released its first quarter financial outcomes. For the first quarter of 2025, the company reported total revenue of $145.0 million, showcasing growth from $129.1 million in the first quarter of 2024. Brokerage commissions amounted to $123.6 million, up from the previous year's $X million.
news.headline: Marcus & Millichap, Inc. (NYSE: MMI) reports Q1 2025 results: Total revenue $145M vs $129.1M in Q1 2024. Brokerage commissions $123.6M.Total Characters: 126

news.summary: The new FICO® Marketplace, launched at FICO World 25, is a revolutionary digital platform connecting organizations with leading data and analytics providers. This hub provides access to data, AI models, optimization tools, decision rulesets, and machine learning models, enabling enterprise business outcomes from AI. The platform was unveiled during a keynote presentation at FICO World, offering easy access to key tools for organizations.
news.headline: FICO introduces FICO Marketplace at FICO World 25, connecting organizations with data providers and AI tools. #FICOMarketplace

news.summary: In Grand Rapids, Michigan, Irwin and bluecube3 have taken a proactive approach in response to impending tariffs. They have developed a dual-sourcing global supply strategy for their Venue360 platform. This strategic move has positioned Venue360 as the only seating system capable of providing top-notch products at competitive global prices in the entertainment industry. This step was taken to combat the challenges posed by tariffs, showcasing a future-oriented mindset. This initiative aims to ensure the continued success of Venue360 amidst uncertain economic conditions.
news.headline: Irwin and bluecube3 implement dual-sourcing supply strategy for Venue360, providing best-in-class products at competitive prices globally.

news.summary: RingCentral, Inc. (NYSE: RNG), a renowned company in AI-driven business communications, has been honored by Frost & Sullivan with the esteemed 2025 Global Customer Value Leadership Award for its exceptional work in the web events sector. Frost & Sullivan acknowledges RingCentral Events™ for its unique approach geared towards creating interactive and impactful virtual, hybrid, and physical events. This recognition highlights RingCentral's extraordinary commitment to delivering value in the industry.
news.headline: RingCentral wins 2025 Global Customer Value Leadership Award from Frost & Sullivan for excellence in web events.

news.summary: In a recent announcement, Omnissa, a prominent digital work platform firm, disclosed their partnership with Nutanix, Inc. to introduce Omnissa Horizon to the Nutanix AHV hypervisor. By teaming up with Nutanix, customers will have increased flexibility in managing virtual desktops and applications, thereby expanding Horizon support from public cloud settings to contemporary on-premises deployments. Interested customers can now sign up to participate in the forthcoming beta program to access this service.
news.headline: Omnissa partners with Nutanix to offer more options for virtual desktops and apps, allowing customers greater flexibility. Customers can request access to the beta program.

news.summary: In Dublin and London, Corlytics, a leading global RegTech company supported by Verdane, has made history by becoming the first firm in its sector to attain the ISO/IEC 42001:2023 certification for its comprehensive AI management system. This prestigious achievement highlights Corlytics' dedication to AI Governance, positioning it among a select group of top technology enterprises. While numerous third-party vendors rapidly adopt AI solutions, only a limited number prioritize security adequately. Notably, last week, JP Morgan's Chief Information Officer made a significant announcement on this issue.
news.headline: Verdane-backed Corlytics gains ISO 42001 certification for AI governance, the first RegTech firm to do so.

news.summary: In Waltham, Massachusetts, Evolv Technologies Holdings, Inc (NASDAQ: EVLV), a key player in security technology utilizing AI solutions for enhanced safety, revealed plans to disclose its financial performance for the first quarter of 2025 on Tuesday, May 20, 2025, post the market closure. The management team will conduct a live webcast at 4:30 p.m. Eastern Time on the same day to delve into the financial outcomes and management strategies.
news.headline: Evolv Tech (NASDAQ: EVLV) to report Q1 2025 results on May 20, 2025, in a webcast at 4:30 pm ET.

news.summary: In Santa Clara, California, Tavant, a renowned company specializing in AI solutions and digital engineering, has introduced the 'AIgnite' AI Accelerator Suite. This suite aims to assist enterprises in swiftly leveraging the potential of GenAI-powered IT automation, data transformation, and developing intelligent applications and AI Agents. Sarvesh Mahesh, the CEO of Tavant, expressed enthusiasm about the launch of the 'AIgnite' AI Accelerator Suite, noting that it signifies a significant advancement in Tavant's AI strategy.
news.headline: Tavant introduces AIgnite™ AI Accelerator Suite for swift AI-driven enterprise transformation, led by CEO Sarvesh Mahesh.

news.summary: In New York, Perfect Corp. (NYSE: PERF), a top provider of AI and AR solutions for beauty and fashion, has revealed a series of prominent events. The 2025 Global Beauty and Fashion AI Forum is set for September 16th at the Metropolitan Pavilion, located at 125 W 18th St, New York, NY 10011. Additionally, the Beautiful AI Luncheon will be held on May 20th at the New York Stock Exchange, 18 Broad St, New York, NY, 10005. These gatherings will bring together key figures from the industry.
news.headline: Perfect Corp. to host 2025 Global Beauty & Fashion AI Forum in NY. Also hosting Beautiful AI Luncheon at NY Stock Exchange.

news.summary: In Orlando, Florida, Strategy (Nasdaq: MSTR/STRK/STRF) presented key updates during the Livestream event for Strategy World 2025 Technology Keynote. Chief Product Officer Saurabh Abhyankar introduced the new Strategy Mosaic™, offering universal business semantics and governance for various AI, productivity, and analytic applications like Tableau, Power BI, and Google Sheets. Additionally, Strategy One™ Auto 2.0 expert agents aim to provide quicker and more scalable AI outcomes, particularly for unstructured data, enabling the extraction of more profound insights.
news.headline: Strategy introduces new data and AI solutions at Strategy World 2025, including Strategy Mosaic and Strategy One Auto 2.0, to enhance analytics.

news.summary: In Overland Park, Kansas, TreviPay has introduced a Pay by Invoice program in collaboration with Northern Tool + Equipment to provide businesses with enhanced flexibility and convenience in handling payments for B2B transactions. This initiative aims to streamline the payment process for businesses and offer them more options for managing their financial transactions.
news.headline: Northern Tool + Equipment partners with TreviPay for Pay by Invoice program offering flexibility and convenience for businesses.
